subcodes.title: Iñupiaq - North Slope Dialect
subcodes.first_line:
## Iñupiaq - North Slope Dialect

Invocation of The Báb

God, God-igigikpiñ, Piviutaġigikpiñ, Pisramaaġaatin uummatiġma.
subcodes.notes: Theory: Inupiaq prayer labeled "Invocation of The Bab" -- very short text "God, God-igigikpin, Piviutagigikpin, Pisramaagaatin uummatigma." May correspond to a short BH or AB invocation. Challenge: North Slope Inupiaq is an endangered Arctic language; "igigikpin" likely means "Most Great" -- possibly related to BH prayer.
